title: More Nonsense Limerick 16
content:
There was an old person of Pinner,
    As thin as a lath, if not thinner;
    They dressed him in white, 
    And roll'd him up tight,
    That elastic old person of Pinner.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 16"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
